channel.title: HeroQuest Club
channel.description: Recent content in Big Box on HeroQuest Club

item.title: Berserker
item.description:
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 7
Mind Points = 2

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Broadsword
Starting Armor = None

You are the berserker.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
here is some content

where am I ?

  • List imte

item.title: Monk
item.description:
rds, and staffs1*= {{< param attac3= {{< param defen6s = {{< param bod4s = {{< param 2 Red Dicet = {{< param move >}*When attacking unarmed, roll one additional Attack die.= {{< param weapon >None = {{<You are the Monk, para student of unarmed combat techniques formed in reverence of the elements. You refuse to use armor or shields, instead relying on your heightened grace and agility. You may only wield daggers, crossbows, handaxes, shortswords, and staffs. {{< param flavor >}}

Soaring Dragon / Eye of the Storm
Twisting Torrent / Tidal Surge
Speak with Stone / Strength of Mountain
Burning Spirit / Touc

item.title: Rogue
item.description:
for danger." +1< param attack >}2< param defend >}5{{< param body >}4{{< param mind2 Red Dice{{< param move >}}
Dagger< param weapon >}} None{< parYou are the Rogue,am fa nimble skirmisher who is deadly with small blades, but you lack the ability to use metal armor and shields. Equiped with your trusty bandolier, you are always prepared for danger.< param flavor >}}*

Ambidesxtrous
Combat Mobility
Opportunistic Striker
Da

item.title: Knight
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 3
Body Points = 7
Mind Points = 2

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Shortsword
Starting Armor = Shield

You are the Knight. A well-trained armored fighter always ready to stand between allies and danger. Armor does not restrict your movement speed.

Knight’s Challenge
Shield Block
Stalwart

item.title: Bard
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 5
Mind Points = 4

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Rapier
Starting Armor = None

You are the bard. Your spirit and songs inspire and invigorate your alies. You prefer to stay light on your feetso when you are wearing non-metal armor and not carrying a shield you have 1 extra Defend die.

Healing Song Inspiring Tale Lullaby

item.title: Druid
item.description:
druid hero may 1." +++

You are the druid,m ara woodland guardian and healer. You are a powerful physical combatant while using your shapeshift spell, but you can be weak when your resources are depleted. A druid hero may not wear metal armor.am flavor_bold >}}** *{{< param fla

item.title: Warlock
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 4
Mind Points = 5

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Wand
Starting Armor = None

You are the warlock, a magical artillerist who has bonded with a sinister creature, allowing you to assume its winged form. Let your allies protect you while you deal damage from afar. Counts as a wizard hero in termso of which weapons, artifacts, and equipment they can use.

Dark Wings
Demon Form
Fear

item.title: Barbarian
item.description:
Attack Dice = 3
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 8
Mind Points = 2

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Broadsword
Starting Armor = None

You are the barbarian, the greatest warrior of all. But beware of magic for your sword is no defense against it.

item.title: Dwarf
item.description: you must avoid 2ld on a combat di2 = {{< param atta7ce = {{< param de3ints = {{< par2 Red Dice Points = {{< param mShoersword {{< param move >}} None {{< pYou are the dwarf.g ArYou are a good warrior and have the unique ability to disarm traps without a tool kit. To do so, you must avoid rolling a black shield on a combat die.r

item.title: Elf
item.description:
Attack Dice = 2
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 6
Mind Points = 4

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Shortsword
Starting Armor = None

You are the elf, a master of both magic and the sword. You must use both well if you are to triumph. You have the power to cast three magical spells, all relating to one element.

item.title: Wizard
item.description:
Attack Dice = 1
Defend Dice = 2
Body Points = 4
Mind Points = 6

Movment = 2 Red Dice
Starting Weapon = Dagger
Starting Armor = None

You are the wizard. You have the ability to cast many different spells. However, you cannot wear armor or use large weapons. Therfore, you must cast your spells wisely and avoid physical combat where you are weak.
